title: Local Authority Housing Statistics data returns for 2024 to 2025
body: "             Local Authority Housing Statistics Sections A, C, D, E, G, H, I and J 2024 to 2025    MS Excel Spreadsheet, 542 KB     This file may not be suitable for users of assistive technology.    Request an accessible format.    If you use assistive technology (such as a screen reader) and need a version of this document in a more accessible format, please email alternativeformats@communities.gov.uk. Please tell us what format you need. It will help us if you say what assistive technology you use.      Notes on Local Authority Housing Statistics (LAHS) 2024-25  The remaining sections of the return will be published alongside other relevant statistical releases over the coming months. A full release calendar is included in the file. The next update will be in January/February 2026.  A full time series of the data since 1978-79 is available alongside these tables. It will be updated to include the entire 2024-25 return in February 2026, when the final sections of LAHS will be published.  Please refer to the LAHS guidance for further information on these statistics. "
